name: Jeff's Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces Whole tomatoes, drained (chop as they cook)
1/4 cup Green bell pepper, chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
This is one of those "precious" recipes that my mother used to cook.
After tenderizing the round steak, dredge in a mixture of flour, garlic powder, and salt.
Brown the outside of the meat quickly in hot oil.
Add the onions, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, tomato paste, tomato sauce, pepper, and chopped tomatoes (if desired) to the pan. Add water if necessary to cover the meat.
Simmer for 2 hours on low heat.
Add the green bell pepper and cook an additional 15-20 minutes.
Serve with mashed potatoes and rolls.
The green bell pepper may be increased to 1/2 cup if desired. (I do)
Enjoy! - Jeff Duke
